title: test de publication
body:
Welcome to Netlify Free!

Your new team patrick-benchadi’s team is ready!

Welcome to Netlify Free! You now have access to powerful tools to deploy and manage your web projects, including a global edge network, instant rollbacks, and live project previews with collaboration UI. Your plan includes 300 credits per month, giving you everything you need to get started.

Unlike paid plans, the Free tier won’t accumulate overages—if you reach your credit limits, your projects will be disabled to prevent unexpected charges. You can always upgrade or add resources as needed.

For a detailed overview of our plans, visit our pricing page.

Go to Dashboard
